title: Maytenus wallichiana
uses: Maytenus wallichiana is known for its various medicinal uses. It is traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Further research is needed to fully explore the potential medicinal applications of Maytenus wallichiana.

This family is part of the larger order Celastrales, a grouping of flowering plants that also includes the family Hippocastanaceae. Maytenus wallichiana is further classified as a genus and species within the Celastraceae family. The genus Maytenus is a group of flowering plants native to the Americas and Southeast Asia, with Maytenus wallichiana being one of the species found in the Himalayan region.
